source_chinese: 央行行长潘功胜在金融街论坛年会上表示，将根据需要适时降准，加大对实体经济的支持力度。
agent_translation: Will the People's Bank of China (PBOC) announce a cut to the Reserve Requirement Ratio (RRR) before August 23, 2026?
reference_translation: Will the People's Bank of China cut the Reserve Requirement Ratio by August 23, 2026?
alternative_phrasings: Will the PBOC cut the Reserve Requirement Ratio by August 23, 2026?
Will the People's Bank of China announce a Reserve Requirement Ratio cut before August 23, 2026?
Will the PBOC announce a cut to the Reserve Requirement Ratio (RRR) by August 23, 2026?
k5_framing_variants: Will the People's Bank of China cut the Reserve Requirement Ratio by August 23, 2026?
Will the PBOC announce a Reserve Requirement Ratio cut before August 23, 2026?
Will China's central bank reduce the RRR for commercial banks by August 23, 2026?
Will the PBOC lower the Reserve Requirement Ratio from its current level by August 23, 2026?
Will the People's Bank of China announce at least one Reserve Requirement Ratio reduction by August 23, 2026?

source_chinese: 财政部宣布将延长针对小微企业的增值税减免政策至2027年12月底。
agent_translation: Will China extend VAT exemption for small/micro enterprises to end-2027?
reference_translation: Will China's Ministry of Finance officially extend the VAT exemption for small and micro enterprises to December 31, 2027 by August 31, 2026?
alternative_phrasings: Will China extend the VAT exemption for small and micro enterprises through December 31, 2027 by August 31, 2026?
Will the Ministry of Finance publish an official notice extending the small-and-micro-enterprise VAT exemption to end-2027 by August 31, 2026?
Will China's MoF formally extend the VAT exemption for small/micro enterprises to 2027-12-31 by August 31, 2026?
k5_framing_variants: Will China's Ministry of Finance officially extend the VAT exemption for small and micro enterprises to December 31, 2027 by August 31, 2026?
Will China extend the small-and-micro VAT exemption through end-2027 by August 31, 2026?
Will the MoF publish an official notice extending the small/micro VAT exemption to 2027-12-31 by August 31, 2026?
Will China's small/micro enterprise VAT exemption be formally extended into 2027 by August 31, 2026?
Will China extend the VAT exemption for small and micro enterprises beyond 2026 (to >= 2027-12-31) by August 31, 2026?

source_chinese: 中国海关总署：1-4月份进出口总值同比增长5.3%，超出市场预期。
agent_translation: Will China's Jan-May 2026 trade growth exceed 5.3%?
reference_translation: Will China's January-May 2026 total trade growth (year-on-year, RMB) exceed 5.3% in the General Administration of Customs release?
alternative_phrasings: Will China's cumulative Jan-May 2026 import-export growth exceed 5.3% year-on-year per GACC?
Will China's total imports and exports for January-May 2026 grow by more than 5.3% year-on-year?
Will GACC report China's Jan-May 2026 trade growth above 5.3% YoY?
k5_framing_variants: Will China's January-May 2026 total trade growth (year-on-year, RMB) exceed 5.3% in the General Administration of Customs release?
Will China's Jan-May 2026 import-export growth exceed 5.3% YoY?
Will GACC report China's Jan-May 2026 trade growth above 5.3% year-on-year (RMB)?
Will China's cumulative Jan-May 2026 trade (imports + exports, RMB) grow more than 5.3% YoY?
Will China's January-May 2026 total trade volume increase by more than 5.3% year-on-year compared to Jan-May 2025?

source_chinese: 国务院常务会议研究部署进一步稳定房地产市场的政策措施。
agent_translation: Will China announce new real estate market stabilization measures before September 1, 2026?
reference_translation: Will China announce new property-market stabilization measures by August 31, 2026?
alternative_phrasings: Will the Chinese government announce additional real estate stabilization measures by August 31, 2026?
Will China's State Council or PBOC announce new property-market support measures by August 31, 2026?
Will China unveil new real-estate stabilization policies before September 1, 2026?
k5_framing_variants: Will China announce new property-market stabilization measures by August 31, 2026?
Will the State Council or PBOC announce new real-estate support policies by August 31, 2026?
Will China unveil concrete new property-market stabilization measures before September 1, 2026?
Will China's government announce additional measures (beyond the May 2026 deliberation) to stabilize the real-estate market by August 31, 2026?
Will China publish new policies aimed at stabilizing the property market by August 31, 2026?

source_chinese: 证监会修订发布上市公司监管指引第10号，强化股东减持监管。
agent_translation: Will the CSRC issue supplementary rules to Guideline No. 10 on shareholder reductions by 2026-08-31?
reference_translation: Will the CSRC publish supplementary implementation rules for Listed Company Guideline No. 10 (shareholder reductions) by August 31, 2026?
